rationale.fidelity: Restricts the decision to cutoff orders, preserves batching-routing coupling and feasibility constraints, and keeps distance as the sole objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Actor, trigger, coupled choices, capacity trade-off, counterfactual, and computational challenge are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; no unsupported novelty assertion appears.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly marks the distance-to-burden link as inferential and excludes congestion, learning, later arrivals, and cost-savings claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and accessible, though somewhat overstructured.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful explanation of the joint warehouse decision and its computational difficulty.
